channel.title: Posts on kompowiec blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on kompowiec blog

item.title: StegoIRC
EmacsOS, on the example of arch
item.description: tested on VirtualBox: Installation of the base system format disk cfdisk Make the filesystem mkfs.ext4 /dev/sda1 Mount the newly created filesystem mount /dev/sda2 /mnt Install Packages pacstrap /mnt base linux linux-firmware grub dhcpcd Configutaion genfstab -U /mnt > /mnt/etc/fstab arch-chroot /mnt grub-install --target=i386-pc /dev/sda --force grub-mkconfig -o /boot/grub/grub.cfg systemctl enable dhcpcd useradd -mG wheel user passwd user passwd exit reboot run internet ip link set enp0s3 up First run pacman -S emacs Use as your shell add to your .

item.title: Install Arch Linux from existing Linux
item.description: I really hate software management in linux. Is too much and it requires at least a basic knowledge of each of them in the event of a lack of application for your distribution. Also i don't like arch because of bleeding-edge. My solution? Install any fixed distro (Debian, RHEL, slackware) Chroot arch. Download arch bootstrap: cd /tmp wget https://geo.mirror.pkgbuild.com/iso/latest/archlinux-bootstrap-x86_64.tar.gz unpack:

item.title: How i healed The Fearful-Avoidant/Disorganized attachment style within 3 months
item.description: Hard choices, makes life easier, easy choices makes life harder First entry will be special and very personal, because the creation of this blog coincided with drastic changes in my life - the title explains it all - and therefore all other work will be suspended until this problem is resolved. I didn't know it existed until June this year. Theoretically, there were articles on Wikipedia that he came across, but in the 2008 Polish edition, there was no mention of a disorganized style and I didn't know English at the time, so I lived in ignorance for the rest of my life.
